a:r.a:t: Plan proliferation drives inconsistency in incentives, weakens transparency, and limits enterprise-wide alignment
Directional estimates based on mapping of role variations to consolidated roles, assuming each role variation corresponds to a distinct compensation plan.
Plan proliferation has become a structural issue, not just an administrative challenge
Localized customization and exceptions increase administrative burden and reduce transparency
Fragmentation limits the ability to standardize and scale compensation systems and reporting
Incomplete integration of Bluegreen, HGV, and Diamond exacerbates plan proliferation
reduce administrative burden, ensure better control, and enable successful ICM/SPM tool implementation

p:cNvPr.name: Graphic 25
p:cNvPr.descr: Lightbulb and gear with solid fill

a:r.a:t: , indicating significant variation within the same role
